allow: PowerShell(foreach \($t in 'winget','choco','scoop','ruby'\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t : $\($c.Source\)" } else { "$t : \(not found\)" } })
PowerShell($env:Path = 'C:\\Ruby33-x64\\bin;' + $env:Path; bundle exec jekyll build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:4000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'hero-title'\) { 'Home page rendered OK' } } catch { "Not ready yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
